title: Show which pod a quadlet is part of in `podman quadlet list`
body:
### Feature request description

The output of `podman quadlet list` doesn't show if a service is part of a `pod`.

### Suggest potential solution

Introduce an additional column `Pod` which contains the pod the service is part of, this however might not make sense for `volumes`

### Have you considered any alternatives?

None

### Additional context

None

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
This can be closed, the functionality is implemented by https://github.com/podman-container-tools/podman/pull/28528
